etymology.interpretation: The character 毛(máo, "hair") visually represents either a feather or the strands of hair, capturing the texture and common features of these natural elements.

examples.chinese: 他的头上有许多白色的毛(他的頭上有許多白色的毛)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de tóu shàng yǒu xǔduō báisè de máo.
examples.english: There are many white hairs on his head.

examples.chinese: 猫的毛很柔软(貓的毛很柔軟)。
examples.english: The cat's hair is very soft.

examples.chinese: 这条围巾是用羊毛制成的(這條圍巾是用羊毛製成的)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè tiáo wéijīn shì yòng yángmáo zhìchéng de.
examples.english: This scarf is made of wool.
